name: logiflow-command-center
description: A full-stack logistics command center for shipments, fleet tracking, warehouses, drivers, deliveries, invoices, and logistics analytics.

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix client && npm run build --prefix server
